arts.ttl: Man United urged to sign Premier League star to help Ruben Amorim fix problem position
arts.sum: United States international Antonee Robinson has been one of the most consistent left-backs in the Premier League since Fulham returned to the top-flight before the 2022/2023 season.

arts.ttl: Manchester United on verge of first Ruben Amorim signing with 'agreement close'
arts.sum: Technical director Jason Wilcox appears to be leading transfer push at Old Trafford after Dan Ashworth’s shock exit

Three Man United stars drop early team news hints as Ruben Amorim makes Viktoria Plzen decision
arts.sum: Manchester United travel to Viktoria Plzen in the Europa League on Thursday (5.45pm) with Ruben Amorim set to make further changes to his starting XI.

arts.ttl: Sheikh Jassim 'monitoring' Man Utd despite snub as Sir Jim Ratcliffe's problems escalate
arts.sum: Sheikh Jassim lost the race to buy a stake in Manchester United to Sir Jim Ratcliffe but is watching with interest as the British billionaire faces increasing problems

arts.ttl: Man United ace’s fall from grace complete as Red Devils don’t expect any bids for £40m-rated international
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford’s stock as an elite player is now so low that Man United aren’t expecting any bids for the player in January despite putting him up for sale. arts.ttl: Angel Gomes transfer talks begin after sending Manchester United message
arts.sum: Angel Gomes is expected to leave Lille at the end of his contract next summer and a Premier League club has already reportedly started talks over a potential transfer.

arts.ttl: Man Utd exit would END Marcus Rashford’s career
arts.sum: A return of seven goals in 23 matches this season is not what Man Utd expected of the 27-year-old and with Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR) potentially forcing a sale, the England forward is reportedly on the transfer market. Data analytics firm SciSports indicates that Man Utd is the best club for Rashford via its Career Advice tool – and by some distance.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim speaks out on “bad situation” as chaotic start at Manchester United continues
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim has spoken out on the departure of Dan Ashworth as sporting director, admitting that it’s not an ideal situation at the club right now.
